M1830_CRNT_BATHG M1830 Current Bathing This field indicates the patient's current ability to wash entire body safely. 00 = Able to bathe self in shower or turn independently, including getting in and out of tub/shower.
01 = With the use of devices, is able to bathe self in shower or tub
independently including getting in and out of the tub/shower.; 02=Able to bathe in shower or tub with the intermittent
